tasks.label: NCOS: Native Test (baseline)
args: Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Path -like '*\.platformio\*' -or $_.ProcessName -like 'pio*' -or $_.ProcessName -like 'python*' -or $_.ProcessName -like 'program*' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if (Test-Path .pio\build) { Remove-Item .pio\build -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; $env:PLATFORMIO_CORE_DIR="$PWD\.pio-core"; if (Test-Path '.pio-core\platforms\platforms.lock') { Remove-Item '.pio-core\platforms\platforms.lock' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; pio test -e native --filter native/test_companion_personality_baseline

tasks.label: NCOS: Native Test (motion)
args: Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Path -like '*\.platformio\*' -or $_.ProcessName -like 'pio*' -or $_.ProcessName -like 'python*' -or $_.ProcessName -like 'program*' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if (Test-Path .pio\build) { Remove-Item .pio\build -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; $env:PLATFORMIO_CORE_DIR="$PWD\.pio-core"; if (Test-Path '.pio-core\platforms\platforms.lock') { Remove-Item '.pio-core\platforms\platforms.lock' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; pio test -e native --filter native/test_motion_service

tasks.label: NCOS: Native Build All
args: Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Path -like '*\.platformio\*' -or $_.ProcessName -like 'pio*' -or $_.ProcessName -like 'python*' -or $_.ProcessName -like 'program*' } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if (Test-Path .pio\build) { Remove-Item .pio\build -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; $env:PLATFORMIO_CORE_DIR="$PWD\.pio-core"; if (Test-Path '.pio-core\platforms\platforms.lock') { Remove-Item '.pio-core\platforms\platforms.lock' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; pio test -e native --without-uploading --without-testing
